chapter_title.en: Chapter 39 – Cutting the grey hair and plucking it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/391)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/391)
text: ( عليه السلام ) أَوَّلُ مَنْ شَابَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ ( عليه السلام ) فَقَالَ يَا رَبِّ مَا هَذَا فَقَالَ نُورٌ وَ تَوْقِيرٌ قَالَ رَبِّ زِدْنِي مِنْهُ .

en.hubeali: ‘He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The first one to be grey-haired was Ibrahim<sup>as</sup>. He<sup>as</sup> said: ‘O Lord<sup>azwj</sup>! What is this?’ So He<sup>azwj</sup> Said: “A radiance and a reverence”. He<sup>as</sup> said: ‘Lord<sup>azwj</sup>! Increase for me<sup>as</sup>, from it’.
en.sarwar: 4. Through the same chain of narrators as that of the previous Hadith the following is narrated: “He (the Imam), ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The first one who noticed gray hairs was Ibrahim ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and he asked, ‘O Lord, what is this?’ He said, ‘It is light and reverence.’ He then said, ‘O Lord, increase it for me.’”
